description: Reusable templates for full Yeeflow application generation. Composition checklists reference templateId and validators enforce template conformance.

templates.purpose: Dashboard title, subtitle, and safe primary or secondary actions.
templates.whenToUse: Any generated dashboard with navigation or work-entry actions.
templates.allowedFallback: Use static action notes when navigation/form actions are not safely supported.
sourceExports: DEMO Innovation Ecosystem Platform (1).yap / NHIC Innovation Overview
observedPatterns: safe padded dashboard root
header action buttons such as All projects and My projects
dashboard text hierarchy
dashboard header is followed by filter/action rows and bounded content containers in NHIC and Service Desk dashboards
limitations: active navigation/action semantics and filter-variable wiring still require validation per package

templates.purpose: Operational metric cards with labels, values, and context.
templates.whenToUse: Dashboard KPI rows, workload summaries, compliance totals, and expiry counts.
templates.allowedFallback: Static aggregate placeholders only when labeled, explicitly approved, and documented as deferred aggregate binding.
sourceExports: DEMO Innovation Ecosystem Platform (1).yap / NHIC Innovation Overview
observedPatterns: sales dashboard summary metrics
project dashboard summaries and progress indicators
NHIC dashboard uses a padded constrained dashboard body with filter row and multiple Summary controls inside row containers
Service Desk Executive Dashboard uses a deep padded container hierarchy with 14 Summary controls, chart sections, filter controls, gaps, borders, and width-constrained rows
summary controls carry business labels, aggregate field settings, card padding, border/radius, and dashboard filter bindings
Vendor Onboarding v4.1 uses hidden Summary controls with attrs.save_var, dashboard tempVars, and visible formatted Text controls for KPI values
limitations: export-proven structure and binding only; aggregate correctness and runtime values still require package-specific validation
static numeric Text values are not acceptable for generated KPI cards unless explicitly approved as deferred placeholders

templates.purpose: Progress, score, or completion summary in a styled card.
templates.whenToUse: Completion, risk score, review progress, or onboarding state summaries.
templates.allowedFallback: Progress bar may replace Progress circle.
sourceExports: DEMO Innovation Ecosystem Platform (1).yap / NHIC Innovation Overview
observedPatterns: progress controls embedded with related text and dynamic fields
summary cards combine business labels with aggregate values and adjacent chart/metric sections
limitations: binding and aggregate calculation must still be validated per package

templates.purpose: Business-specific risk, warning, or action alert.
templates.whenToUse: Compliance risks, expiring documents, review blockers, or required actions.
templates.allowedFallback: Static business-specific alert content if dynamic alert binding is deferred.
observedPatterns: Alert advanced control appears in dashboard pages
dashboard status/metric groups provide business-specific performance context; generated alerts still require real business copy
limitations: business-specific alert copy remains a generation responsibility; generic alert text is still invalid

templates.purpose: Configured table of records with source-bound columns.
templates.whenToUse: Record lists, review queues, related records, and operational tables.
templates.allowedFallback: Collection/list cards with equivalent fields if Data table is unsupported.
observedPatterns: dashboard data table with Field and FieldName columns bound to Accounts
related data tables on Account view for Contacts and Opportunities
Online Library Print Inventory uses repeated table-v2 rows/sections with dynamic fields for multi-item inventory print output
Sales Quotation Print Page uses a line-item list body/footer pattern for product and service rows plus totals
limitations: dashboard Data table Field/FieldName binding remains a separate rule; print line-item lists use print/list controls rather than dashboard data-list columns

templates.purpose: Status, risk, or category board with meaningful cards.
templates.whenToUse: Onboarding boards, review queues, risk boards, and task boards.
templates.allowedFallback: Use collection_card_board with same field/action contract.
observedPatterns: Kanban dashboard item template with dynamic fields and item actions
data-list Kanban views for operational lists
limitations: drag/drop and all item action variants need focused runtime proof per generated package

templates.purpose: Card board or grouped card list with dynamic item templates.
templates.whenToUse: Queues, related-card boards, quick review cards, and timeline fallbacks.
templates.allowedFallback: Use Data table with equivalent columns and documented reason.
observedPatterns: Collection of activity cards with dynamic fields and item actions
project dashboard and detail-page card collections
limitations: some project collections use low dynamic field counts, so generated cards must still meet template minimums

templates.purpose: Navigation shortcuts to common app tasks.
templates.whenToUse: Dashboards that need fast access to forms, workspaces, or views.
templates.allowedFallback: Use static shortcut notes when navigation action schema is unsafe.
observedPatterns: dashboard action buttons for All projects and My projects
Icon list advanced control in Company Overview
limitations: full quick-link card navigation pattern still needs package-specific action validation

templates.purpose: Gmail/Outlook-style three-column business workspace shell with export-proven Yeeflow container mechanics: root page body shell, absolute full-page row layout, fixed left/right panels, fill-width main panel, full-height panels, hidden panel overflow, sticky headers, scrollable bodies, and bottom support regions.
templates.whenToUse: Use for task centers, service desk inboxes, CRM workspaces, renewal reviews, review queues, triage surfaces, and list-detail-detail work management pages.
templates.whenNotToUse: Do not use for simple forms, simple dashboards, mobile-first minimal pages, or generated-final designs with placeholder-only panels.
templates.allowedFallback: Use a two-column list/detail layout or standard dashboard sections when meaningful three-panel content cannot be generated safely.
observedPatterns: root shell common.pos absolute with left/right/top/bottom runtime offsets
three_column_workspace_shell must be the root page body container for dashboard Style 2
default Main > Content wrappers can prevent full-height rendering and must not wrap the shell
dashboard page content width is Full Width and page padding is 0
root shell flex row with gap token
left panel fixed width 360px and right panel fixed width 480px
main panel fill-width behavior using widthtype 0
all panels height 100% and overflow hidden
panel body regions overflow scroll and height 100%
headers are sticky top 0 with z-index 2 and separator border
bottom regions use separator border and row alignment
runtime HTML maps attrs into ak-dynamic CSS classes
limitations: reference body regions contain designer drop-zone placeholders that must be replaced in generated final apps
runtime interaction and selected-record refresh remain unproven for generated apps
mobile/responsive behavior uses display conditions in the reference and needs separate proof

header: row direction, center alignment, space-between for action areas
body: body container attrs.style.overflow = scroll or auto
bottom: bottom/support container present only with meaningful content
icons: icon controls use inline width behavior
icon size is intentionally bounded for panel/header context

templates.purpose: Stateful operational inbox/workbench on an approval/form surface with navigation, collection, selected-record workspace, and right detail/attribute panel.
templates.whenToUse: Service desk, help desk, CRM workbench, case console, support queue, renewal review, and operational inbox apps that need form actions, variables, selected-record behavior, comments, dynamic field controls, and action-driven filtering.
templates.doNotUseWhen: The page is primarily a reporting dashboard, simple request form, simple data-list view, or real approval workflow that should not be represented as a no-submit workspace shell.
requiredLayoutProperties: form workspace host surface when state/actions/comments are required
YAP workspace generation follows docs/standards/yap-approval-form-workspace-generation-standard.md
YAP approval/form workspaces use Data.Forms[].ListID = 0, root Type 105 navigation, and aligned Resource.FormKeys, Data.Forms.Key, navigation key, and DefResource defkey/key
YAP workspace form content uses DefResource.pageurls[].formdef.children with export-style lowercase controls; formdef.controls is forbidden
YAP no-submit workspace forms still include StartNoneEvent -> SequenceFlow -> EndNoneEvent
YAP workspace page settings hide default header, use Full width, and set padding 0
positioned row shell with navigation, collection, selected workspace, and details regions; reference uses common.pos absolute, centered placement, style.direction row, and style.gap 0
fixed-width navigation panel around 400px and ticket collection panel around 500px
fill-width selected workspace region with fill conversation/activity panel and fixed right attributes panel around 420px
full-height columns with independent Scroll or Auto overflow and bounded shell height; outer shell uses Hidden overflow where it owns the page
nav rows are horizontal icon plus text containers with actions, row direction, align-items, gap, padding, and bounded icons
Icon, Text/heading, Button, and Dynamic field controls use inline width behavior by default
icons in menu/text rows match nearby text size, such as 16px icons for 16px text
collection item click sets selected/current record state and uses row/card layout with padding, background, radius, and selected-state styling
details panels bind dynamic fields to selected/current record
comment/update actions target the selected record and related activity list when included
reference property map: docs/studies/normalized/service-desk-pro-form-workspace/reference-property-map.normalized.json
default-container-only implementations are forbidden
YAP Service Desk generated workspace baseline uses designer-load-safe list/container/heading/icon controls only; collection and dynamic-field require exact export-proven approval/form workspace shape
YAP child list sample data is a record-id keyed ListDatas object with row keys resolving to Defs[].FieldName
YAP Service Desk field numbering preserves native Title plus Text2... business fields and avoids generated Text1 or Lookup1 drift
templates.allowedFallback: Use static designer-safe heading/container ticket cards for YAP approval/form workspaces when collection, dynamic-field, selected-record refresh, or comment controls are not copied from an exact export-proven host shape. Use dashboard three_column_workspace_shell or standard list/detail page only when selected-record/comment/action behavior is explicitly deferred and documented.
templates.proofStatus: v8 designer-load-proven baseline for YAP uses list/container/heading/icon only; broader collection/dynamic-field behavior requires separate export/runtime proof for this host
sourceExports: Service Desk Pro (1).yap / Workspace approval-form page
Service Desk Pro-v1 - Init.yapk / AppExportPackageInfo and lists
observedPatterns: approval/form workspace rather than dashboard
absolute row shell
fixed-width help desk navigation
fixed-width ticket collection
selected ticket conversation/detail workspace
right details and attributes panel
form actions for navigation filters
variables for current user/filter state
collection item selected-record actions
comment submission to ticket activities
collapse/expand actions

templates.purpose: Chronological activity, history, or milestone feed.
templates.whenToUse: Recent activity, history, approvals, and review timelines.
templates.allowedFallback: Use Collection with timeline-style item template.
observedPatterns: vertical and horizontal timeline pages with dynamic item fields
collection fallback for activity display
limitations: runtime interaction beyond render is not proven by these exports

templates.purpose: Record detail summary header.
templates.whenToUse: Primary list View forms and detail pages.
templates.allowedFallback: Read-only header without buttons when actions are unsafe.
observedPatterns: project/task/company detail pages with status, owner, picture/date, and field summary sections
limitations: status badge styling and action behavior need generated package validation

templates.purpose: Tabbed or sectioned detail page shell.
templates.whenToUse: Detail pages with overview, documents, compliance, tasks, and history.
templates.allowedFallback: Sectioned layout when Tabs are not safely supported.
observedPatterns: dashboard Tab and Toggle control pages
Project detail page with tab/dropbar-like navigation and related sections
limitations: exact generated Tab host shape must match target page host

templates.purpose: Business section cards for New/Edit forms.
templates.whenToUse: Data entry and request intake forms.
templates.allowedFallback: Single-column section cards when grid settings are unsafe.
observedPatterns: Data Lists custom forms with field grids
Sales opportunity/account New/Edit sections
Project and task edit forms
limitations: visual card polish still must be enforced by templates

templates.purpose: Document requirements and file upload/status checklist.
templates.whenToUse: Vendor intake, compliance, and document tracking forms.
templates.allowedFallback: Related Vendor Documents Data table when Dynamic Sub List is not safe.
observedPatterns: Dynamic Sub List field in Data Lists forms
Projects document upload/detail forms
limitations: Vendor-style required document checklist with upload/review lifecycle still needs golden proof or focused package validation

templates.purpose: Related child records on a detail page.
templates.whenToUse: Documents, reviews, tasks, or history related to a primary record.
templates.allowedFallback: Read-only related list/table with documented filter-binding gap.
observedPatterns: Project detail page related task/issue/collection sections
Sales Account view related Contacts and Opportunities data tables
limitations: relationship filters and current-record context must be validated per generated package

templates.purpose: Read-only print-oriented record summary.
templates.whenToUse: Printable record or vendor summary pages.
templates.allowedFallback: Use record code text when QR/barcode controls are unsafe.
observedPatterns: Sales Quotation Print Page uses a structured print layout with logo/picture area, customer/quotation summary fields, terms text, totals, background/border styling, padding, gaps, and width-constrained rows
Online Library Print Inventory uses a printable dashboard-like page with padded sections, heading text, dynamic fields, dynamic image, and repeated inventory output
limitations: export-proven only; browser print rendering and page-break behavior still require runtime/manual proof

templates.purpose: Printable document checklist/status rows.
templates.whenToUse: Print pages with document evidence or required documents.
templates.allowedFallback: Static checklist rows only with documented data-binding gap.
observedPatterns: Online Library Print Inventory proves multi-item print table/checklist composition with repeated table-v2 sections and dynamic fields
Sales Quotation Print Page proves single-record line-item table/list composition with header, body rows, footer/totals, and descriptive fields
limitations: document-specific lifecycle/status semantics remain package-specific; generated print tables must bind configured fields and stay read-only

templates.purpose: Scannable or textual record identity on print output.
templates.whenToUse: Print pages requiring QR, barcode, or safe record code fallback.
templates.allowedFallback: Use a field-bound business code such as Vendor Code, Quote Number, Inventory Code, or Serial Number when QR generation is deferred; do not use static placeholder URLs.
sourceExports: Online Library.yap / Detail Page and Barcode Scan
observedPatterns: QR Code and Barcode controls appear on Company Overview View page
Online Library proves Barcode and list QR Code controls on inventory/detail surfaces and a separate printable Inventory page
Sales Quotation proves print-page layout but does not include QR/barcode controls
Online Library (1) Print Inventory places a list-qrcode control inside a repeated Collection item context so each printed inventory item receives its own QR code
Sales Quotation (1) Print Page places a list-qrcode control inside the single-record print page container so the QR is scoped to the current quotation record
QR sections sit inside padded print/container structure and rely on current item/current record context rather than static placeholder URLs
limitations: export-proven structure only; browser print rendering and scanned QR destination behavior still require runtime/manual proof

templates.purpose: Standard Kanban item template with dynamic fields and actions.
templates.whenToUse: Any required Kanban item card.
templates.allowedFallback: Collection card template with same field/action contract.
observedPatterns: Kanban item template with 10 dynamic controls and edit/delete actions
limitations: new generated packages must still resolve action targets and current-item fields

templates.purpose: Standard Collection item template with dynamic fields and actions.
templates.whenToUse: Any required Collection card board or card list.
templates.allowedFallback: Data table with equivalent columns and documented reason.
observedPatterns: Collection item template with 9 dynamic controls and item actions
limitations: new generated packages must still resolve action targets and current-item fields

templates.purpose: Local item action row for cards.
templates.whenToUse: Cards requiring edit, delete, update, or workflow actions.
templates.allowedFallback: Static action notes with explicit deferred reason.
observedPatterns: Edit item, Delete Item, Mark as completed item action buttons
limitations: runtime mutation proof remains scoped to previous focused package

templates.purpose: Selection-aware bulk action toolbar.
templates.whenToUse: Multi-select update/delete/review operations.
templates.allowedFallback: Omit active bulk toolbar and document deferred reason.
observedPatterns: bulk Mark as completed and Delete selected items actions around Collection controls
limitations: selected ID/count variable wiring must be validated per generated package

templates.purpose: Render source-list records as responsive Collection cards.
wrapperRequirements: selected count text when multiselect is generated
operation toolbar when bulk actions are generated
itemCardStructure: dynamic-file only when file fields exist
proofBoundaries: YAPK card Collection proven for the decoded Company Overview card pattern through strict or tolerant Brotli
YAPK validation inspects Pages[].LayoutInResources[].Resource, Forms[].DefResource pageurls[].formdef, and Childs[].Layouts[].LayoutInResources[].Resource
Collection + Grid table-style pattern is separate

templates.purpose: Render responsive Collection cards with export-proven item operations.
proofBoundaries: do not substitute form actions for Collection actions
YAPK action steps are limited to the decoded card pattern families: confirm, listitem, otheraction, setdatalist, setvar

templates.purpose: Render responsive Collection cards with multiselect selected state and bulk toolbar.
proofBoundaries: generate only when selected state and bulk actions are export-proven
YAPK multiselect proven only for the decoded card pattern
Collection + Grid table-style pattern is separate
templates.sourceReference: Company Overview v1.3 / Collection card multiple select / card_with_multiselect_toolbar_wrapper
exportShapeContract: preserve Collection root attrs.actions and multiselect action settings
include page-level filterVars, tempVars, actions, filter, and formAction dependencies
allow edits only in card_col_title_wrapper, op_normal, op_multipleselected, card_col_item, and card_col_item_operations

templates.purpose: Render dense operational records as a table-like Collection body with a header flex_grid and repeated item flex_grid.
requiredStructure: item flex_grid as first Collection child
itemGridRequirements: desktop columns match header count and widths
proofBoundaries: dashboard/page usage proven from Projects Center
approval-form and data-list-form hosts remain pending

templates.purpose: Render grid/table Collection rows with checkbox selection and bulk operations.
requiredMultiselectShape: Collection root attrs.actions[] with type coll
proofBoundaries: generate when a Dashboard dataset needs dense table scanning, multi-row selection, selected count/state, and batch operations; Projects Center / Project Tasks is the export-proven source reference, not a business-domain restriction
do not infer card-style top-right selection behavior
templates.sourceReference: Projects Center_1 v1.6 / All Tasks - multiple select / grid_table_col_multiselect_wrapper
exportShapeContract: preserve Collection root attrs.actions and multiselect action settings
include page-level filterVars, tempVars, actions, filter, and formAction dependencies
allow edits only in grid_table_col_title_wrapper, op_normal, op_multipleselected, grid_table_col_header, and grid_col_item
keep grid_table_col_header and grid_col_item columns identical

templates.purpose: Add search/fulltext filtering to a grid/table Collection.
requiredSearchShape: fulltext fields resolve to source list
proofBoundaries: search proven for Projects Center task table fields
other operators or hosts need separate proof
